title: The Hunter Becomes the Hunted: Protecting High Value Research from Nation-State Espionage — D-RED Seminar Slides
display_label: Protecting Research from Nation-State Espionage Slides (2026-03-11)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2026-03-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'The Hunter Becomes the Hunted: Protecting High Value Research from Nation-State Espionage' presented by Erdal Ozkaya, PhD. Covers nation-state-level threats to high-value university research, attacker tradecraft, and defensive measures for principal investigators and research support staff. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/hHg8NH2wqOJ1RAjYPjdStN0oQYuTkILCsFH7v1YTVlSI9sK3UOwlj7LG14NHDI4r.IPDhRsTS-Gcjc8tE
